item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: Hard 2024 ahead
item.description: ** Edit .... Thank you everyone for your kind words , support , and personal stories . They have truly touched me . I hope every single one of you has an amazing xmas . And just know that this community unknowingly got me through the darkest time of my life . Thank you again so so much ❤️❤️❤️❤️ Long time lurker , very few post ... My son was killed in a single car accident as a back seat passenger . He was wearing his seatbelt . The driver was drunk and walked away without a scratch . The other passenger had minor injuries . They were coming home from a work xmas party at a major chain bar/restuarant in Canada . Everyone was over served . The other passengers bar bill included 4 beers and 16 shots in a 4 hour span . He is 19 yrs old . My son turned 22 yrs old on the 12th of December . Graduated College on the 14th of December . And on the 18th a police officer knocked on my door at 7:55 am . I have a younger son (15 yrs old ) and a very good support system around me . I have all the distress phone numbers I need although I havent called yet . The viewing on the 27th and funeral on the 28th . I just wanted to thank this beautiful community for keeping me together . Hug your kids and tell them you love them .
item.dc:creator: thatguy79ish

item.title: Happy Holidays from Frankfurt
item.description: It's a very special Christmas, because for the first time in almost 10 years, my semi-estranged brother decided to join my mom and oldest brother! My boyfriend and my best friend (left) also celebrated with us, and it's just magical having all my favourite people around me like this. I hope all of you are having a great time as well!
item.dc:creator: WeirdStray

item.title: Christmas Eve Dump
item.description:
Merry Christmas Eve, Imgur
I like to send inappropriate elf ideas to my friends who got suckered into doing elf on a shelf
I don't know if you've noticed, but I really enjoy puns
Yes
Right?!
Markiplier is peek man
She's strong willed, and I know it's a good trait for her to have, but damn it's hard parenting her sometimes
Can confirm
I am the one with the baby in this scenario
I know it's not selfie day, but I was hanging out with my in-laws dog last night, and he cuddled with me, and I just couldn't contain my excitement. So, dog tax. Happy Holidays! Stay safe and sane out there.
item.dc:creator: WanderingUterus

item.title: My Christmas Cosplays
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here to wish you all a Merry Christmas (Eve)!
This might be a little premature, but I’m Cuban/Puerto Rican and the big day for us is the 24th (Noche Buena)!
So here’s some of my Christmas cosplays this year for you beautiful folks here on Imgur.
Hope you all get exactly the gifts you want. I did not find a handsome man dressed like a bat under the tree this year, but such is my lot in life.
Merry Christmas from SnarkyJay, AKA RectalPossum. PS I heard the name in a dream once. That’s the reason behind it. PPS Yes, I know I can change it. No, I don’t want to.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: I finished painting my first oil painting at the fine arts academy!
item.description: I just finished painting my first oil painting at the fine arts academy of Verona! AND I COULDN'T BE HAPPIER WITH HOW IT CAME ALONG! Since I take a lot of inspiration from Johannes Vermeer as a painter, I painted the Girl With a Pearl Earring but I decided to give it a modern look. I gave her a smile, red lipstick and eyeliner. I also put shiny crystals and sequins to make her a more modern look and add even more contrast to the painting, which is really the style of Johannes Vermeer. I took inspiration for the crystals and sequins from Taylor Swift's 2023 Grammys' dress. It's also the dress she was wearing in the oil painting of her that I painted about a year ago. I found it very captivating. I think its colors as well as the way it shines is really beautiful. I think it's fair to title this painting “Girl With a Pearl Earring (Taylor's version)”. ;) This painting is a unique piece and it's currently available for sale so if you'd be interested in purchasing it, please do not hesitate to reach out to me either via dms or via my official website: anisjerbi.com If this is the first time you come across me, I'm a 20-year-old, self-taught artist who just started to study fine arts at the fine arts academy of Verona, so if you'd like to support me, please make sure to follow me! I appreciate it a lot! I would also like to give a special “Thank You” to each and every one of you who donates to support me as a young artist both with one-time donations on PayPal and monthly ones on Patreon. Every donation could not help more and I will never thank you all enough for all of your support! Every supportive comment and DM really does mean a lot to me as well! Thank you all so much! Also, if you'd like to purchase an artwork from me (like this one) or commission an artwork from me, please do not hesitate to reach out to me either via DM's on here or via my official website: anisjerbi.com. I will respond to your request in no time. I hope you will like this oil painting as much as I do and stay tuned, because I'm already working on 2 other oil paintings! And of course, I had to use this song. :) P.S. Sorry for the late post on here but I had to re-edit it to make the video shorter for Imgur since I originally made it for IG and I made it half a minute longer for IG.
item.dc:creator: AnisJerbi

item.title: Merry Christmas from my sleep study!
item.description: If I look uncomfortable... Yes! Red cross on my forehead for Ash Wednesday apnea awareness, I guess. Actually, they measured my head for electrode placement. I got some on my chin, secured by the goopiest goop that ever gooped. Water soluble at least.

This was my Christmas outfit this year, though i had my tshirt tucked in! Its a Sabaton shirt with the Chtistmas Truce on it, me and my partner had one each, different designs hehe! Sorry for the akwars selfie i am very tired now!
Bonus, me and the teddies, they had a cozy evening on the sofa guarding our place while we where gone hehe!

item.title: A very safe, warm holiday to all those for whom it was never a phase
item.description:
If you're stuck wherever you are and can't see your family for the holidays, here's a random collection of things that made me smile. Congratulations on getting through all of your worst days. ❤️
I have not yet tried this-- if anyone does, please report back how they taste?
This is my kitten when she first came home.
This is not my painting, but it is actually not far off of what my synesthesia "looks like" when I hear music. It changes depending in the song, but I "see" colored textures happening, like falling sand or scratches or something close to bubbles popping. It also happens with taste, but in a different way, mostly just colors.
Another picture of my kitten when she first came home, next to her older sister. Burrito on the left, Uni on the right
This is the "sound" of space. I'll edit this post when I find the original source-- it's pretty cool. Original Source: https://www.nasa.gov/universe/new-nasa-black-hole-sonifications-with-a-remix/
Just a babe in space
I am obsessed with King of The Hill crossover memes. If you have some, please share.
https://youtu.be/tJdgErAfiRQ?si=0MAvFX_J4ZUMgfcu
Age of Empires reference
10 seconds of al pastor sounds
I help grow plants in space. This picture is of what's likely to be one of the first habitat on the moon. It's quite tiny, literally only just big enough to house two researchers at a time with two cots, a "kitchen" (if you could call it that), and a toilet. When will it go up there? Rule of thumb is that when NASA says 10 years, it's more like 30.
This is the gag picture I send when I receive "send bobs and vegana" spam; feel free to also steal. Merry Christmas, Imgur. ❤️❤️
item.dc:creator: TalleyZorah

item.title: Long time lurker partakers in Selfie Day
item.description: Usually I hate scrolling the holidays because content dies and I want to giggle, but I'm making a resolution to be more positive in 2024 so might as well start now! Happy cold season to all non-desert folk who enjoy this frigid period and a thank you to my secret Santa for the weather nerd socks, they are dorky and fun for work! I ended a toxic relationship just before Thanksgiving so I'm spending this one diligently ensuring I don't reach out due to loneliness and that I focus on my growth and friends who have been so patient with me. My Christmas wish is for grocery prices to go down in 2024 ? save my wallet.
item.dc:creator: itobunny

item.title: Dave's not here, man.
item.dc:creator: DCA4242

item.title: It’s Felix Christmas Eve!!!!!
item.description:
Jim got to see him yesterday when he dropped off his medication. He also took him shopping for a little Christmas gift. I sent a stuffed animal over that he used to play with when he was a baby and I rubbed it all over my head first. It made him very happy to play with it. I will get to see him in a few months when I take him in for his yearly check up.
He is doing better than I ever would’ve expected. He rarely has episodes of spicy fly seizures anymore, and he’s his new Dad’s best friend in the whole world.
The tongue still kills me lol
He loves shopping!
He finally picked out this frisbee.
Still the most beautiful eye
His “Mom toy” made him really happy
Meera still has concerns. Daily.
Sammy pulled “A Christmas Story“ on his own nose while menacing someone at the fence with his wet snoot.
We did a solid for a local rescue by being a drop off point for some four month old Great Dane puppies. Then the next morning, we took the two adult males to the veterinarian to be neutered. These guys all went into foster care. As you can tell, we are both sick or we would have done more. Lots of sneezing, and coughing in the background is us.
I love how they all have to fit in the bathroom with Jim.
The Grinchy Cow Dog says Merry Christmas to all. From our family to you, we couldn’t love you more if we tried. You all have been a source of support and love for our family, and it has gotten us through some very hard times. We hope nothing but the best for everyone for the coming year. We can all do it if we work together.
item.dc:creator: thevaiobandit101

item.title: Christmas Selfie Bingo!
item.description:
There, now that I have your attention, I'm posting my Imgur Christmas Selfie Bingo Card. Thanks to all you wonderful degenerates, I had a nearly full card before midnight! I didn't feel comfortable posting it before my local midnight, so here it is now.
First off, thanks to @MRNate for the idea. I've included a blank copy below, but I encourage you to swing by and upvote the original (https://imgur.com/gallery/BAR0a7B). Second, there were plenty of users who could take multiple squares, so I just went with the first ones I came across. Thanks to: @CaptBuckMinster - Hero on the job @CaptCash - Christmas Movie Cosplay @WeSingLalaWhileTheDevilDoesTheChaCha - Dog in the picture @CarterTheBird - Secret Santa reference @Stalker2k - Cat in the picture @ItsTwoRaccooooons - Non-baby child included in picture @DBCooper133602 - "Thank you imgur"... @phoenixaddams - Drinking or holding a beverage in picture @jadda123876 - Gender transitioning or transitioned within the last year @SavageMaiden - Christmas Tree in background @joble - Outdoor pic that includes snow @sweateryams - Beard longer than 3 inches @Rookieragequit - Boobs @imredheaded - Recent radical hair change - new color, new cut, etc @Raider2187 - Ugly Christmas sweater @Anybodys - Significant other included @CERN009 - Newborn Baby included @JarlmannViking - Includes the phrase "Filthy Animals" or "Humbug" @BottomShelfVodka - Imgur famous person in usersub (sorry @sleeperkid, BSV beat you to it) @Tinyfish3 - Medical patient or hospital shot @TiredOldBroad - Formal - dresses, ties & formal wear (Honorable mention to @zatica, @esm432, and @Matty3D for the "hero" square) Also, sorry for anyone who gets tagged twice on this. I tried to edit it and ended up having to delete and repost it.
The blank for anyone who wants to play (I've got you covered for the middle square)
Take care everyone. I hope your holidays are better than you deserve. :)
Addie tax MV Edit: Holy hell! Most Viral - and for a Christmas Selfie post, no less. I’m both proud and slightly ashamed. Send nudes to whoever you feel would appreciate them!
item.dc:creator: TheOmegleMan
